Get Started
AgentsServicesPricingCase StudiesBlogAbout Get Started

Built From a Beach
in Thailand

DotRockets started with a question: What if AI agents were free?

In 2024, Björn sat on Koh Phangan watching AI companies charge $200/month for basic automation. As a digital nomad, he knew there had to be a better way.

Open-source tools existed. Self-hosting was possible. The missing piece? Someone to put it all together.

DotRockets was born: an AI agent agency that builds on open-source, charges once, and hands you the keys. No subscriptions. No lock-in. No bullshit.

Our Mission

Democratize AI automation. Make enterprise-grade agents accessible to everyone.

Our Values

🔓

Open Source First

We build on open-source and contribute back. No black boxes.

🌍

Location Independent

Our stack works from anywhere. Built by nomads, for nomads.

💡

Radical Transparency

Open pricing, open code, open communication. Always.

🚀

Results Over Hype

We measure in conversions, hours saved, and ROI. Not buzzwords.

.Rockets

Open Source AI Agents & Automation.
Built from Koh Phangan 🌴
